no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: TD-035 already exists at docs/helix/02-design/technical-designs/TD-035-artifact-search-semantics.md and already documents the requested search ladder, 256 KiB body cap, binary skip rules, and 200 ms p95 budget. The blocking issue is that `ddx doc audit --json --exit-zero` still reports pre-existing unrelated document-graph failures in this worktree, including the FEAT-002 -> FEAT-008 -> FEAT-013 -> FEAT-014 -> FEAT-016 -> FEAT-020 -> MET-002 -> SD-013 -> SD-019 -> FEAT-002 cycle and many duplicate_id entries under .agents/skills/docs/. Because the audit is not clean for reasons outside this TD, AC3 cannot be proven in this attempt without broader repository repairs.
